杜：我知今場波係唔好睇 但打波圖其實唔易

Tuchel on beating Porto: "I can appreciate the games weren't the best to watch on TV for spectators but it isn't easy to play against Porto.

They showed the team spirit needed when you don't have the experience." #CFC #UCL  #CHEPOR

未知高fa cup出唔出到

Tuchel delivers some bad news: "Kovacic got a muscle injury out of almost nothing. We played a training game in little boxes, his hamstring. He is unsure for the game against City as well. He is a big loss." #CFC #UCL #CHEPOR

本身今場係高正選，而唔係毒撚

Tuchel was unsure N'Golo Kante could complete 90 minutes today. Kovacic was going to start and Kante wasn't.

Adds on Kante: "All my family love him when they watch our games!" #CFC #UCL #CHEPOR

replies.msg: 沉船

杜：車值得晉級

場波係難踢，隔住部電視會覺得好難睇；
但企係場邊嘅我認為係一場快而激烈嘅賽事

己隊需要頻繁咁破解逼搶
對手進攻踢得好有流動性同侵略性，可以隨意調換位置，後上同疊”雅”
所以己隊要隨時準備適應佢地嘅走位

隨住場波一分一秒咁過，我覺得己隊應付得愈來愈好
整體來講，我對己隊點樣防守同應付呢場困難嘅賽事感到高興

‘We accepted what was needed tonight and I think we deserved to go through,’ said Tuchel.

‘It was a tough game, perhaps not the best to watch on the television but from the sidelines I could see a very fast and intense match.

‘It was a tough fight and we had to work hard at times to escape the pressure. They played in a very fluid and aggressive way. They showed that they can change positions all the time, they come up behind and overlap and then, in the next instance, they can underlap. So we had to be ready to adapt to their many movements.

‘With every minute that went by, I think we did that even better and overall I am very happy with how we defended and managed this difficult game.

杜：雖然場波無零封，但值得有

雖然己隊今場製造機會唔多，但仍有更好嘅入球機會
能夠入到一球嘅話，就可以結束場波

‘I think we deserved a clean sheet tonight but it wasn’t to be, and at the other end I thought we had the better chances even if we did not create too many. We could not finish our play off with a goal, so we had to hang in there and the guys did that so well and I’m happy.

‘I might not have been the best game to watch on the television but on the sidelines I saw a lot of fight and a lot of work and it was a pleasure to be there with these guys. Overall, I think we deserved to win this tie.’
After confirming few mins ago that Neymar will stay, #PSG president spoke to RMC Sport: “We'll invest a lot in the club, Neymar and Mbappé have no excuse to leave PSG”.
講真個球12碼最後希望 輸左波嘈下都仲理解到既
又要捱多兩晚夜

幫Benson宣傳

Benson:
上星期應承咗大家但無開節目，今個星期次回合後即刻開番一集
節目時間：4月14日 （星期三）晚上10時30分

《The Blue Flag》迎來節目內容小變更！
除咗一集節目有賽事前瞻同展望之外，亦會加入唔同專題，深入分析球隊每一個位置

今集內容大要：
1. 歐聯/英超賽後檢討
2. 展望球季最後直路
3. 專題一：佐真奴表現重要性
4. 專題二：購買新中堅人選
